- What changed
- Why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `make format`
- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `make test-unit-all`
- [ ] Verified on affected platforms

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `docs/decisions.md` if long-term behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/features/<feature>.md` if feature rules or invariants changed
- [ ] Updated other docs if user-visible behavior changed

## Risks

- Main regression risk
- Follow-up work
